The Team

The people by your side

When you work with Blick, you work with people who care about your project as much as you do. Our team blends technical sales, mud engineering expertise, and logistics capability — one mindset, make it easy for our customers to do their best work.

55+
Years in drilling
2
Countries
8
Warehouses
1700+
Product lines
Meet the Team

Names, faces, expertise you can trust

Different roles, one mindset: make it easy for our customers to do their best work.

TB
Tim Babbage
General Manager
New Zealand

Passionate about drilling fluids across oil & gas, geothermal, diamond coring, waterwell, HDD, and construction. Tim's driven, knowledgeable, and ready to help. Outside work he enjoys F45, poker, and coffee.

+64 27 4 70 0777
tim@blick.group
JS
Jon Speedy
Strategic Partner Manager
Christchurch & AU Coasts

Known to take on the hottest curries, Jon brings positive competition to the team. Based in Christchurch managing South Island and both Australian coasts — he builds strong relationships and has great technical knowledge.

+64 21 781 861
jon@blick.group
ST
Shaun Tubb
General Manager / Operations
New Zealand

He'll pull out a Seinfeld quote to suit any occasion. Relentlessly dissatisfied — if there's an innovative, effective way of doing something, he will find it.

+64 27 868 0026
shaun@blick.group
MS
Meghan Stannett
Account Manager
New Zealand

So fresh we're still getting the wrapping off. Brings a technical background to the role and has already hit the ground running with the Hamilton team.

+64 27 266 6210
meghan@blick.group
🐾
Lulu
Happiness & Conflict Resolution Manager
Hamilton, NZ

Here for the treats, the pats, and the coffee walks. Lulu provides essential reassurance to the team during those challenging moments.

Always available. Never unavailable.
CA
Clay Adams
Technical Sales Manager
Hamilton, NZ

Passionate about bits, mountain biking, and banter. Based in Hamilton, leading tunnelling and construction across ANZ. He loves understanding how things work and thinking about the bigger picture.

+64 27 520 0742
clay@blick.group
LG
Luke Galanti
Technical Sales Manager
Melbourne, East Coast AU

Highly entertaining and a great listener. Luke is observant, insightful, and challenges things to be better. Covers East Coast diamond coring, waterwell, HDD, and tunnelling.

+61 426 763 048
luke@blick.group
NS
Nisha Shariff
Finance Manager
New Zealand

Known internally as The Boss. Manages finances, forex, and cashflow — and the accountants. Nisha loves doing a great job, is easy to get along with, and can hold her own.

+64 7 849 2366
nisha@blick.group
CT
Chris Thomas
Procurement Manager
New Zealand

Good energy, positivity, and incredibly loyal. He's deep into the detail and nails the numbers. Purchases stock and custom items with excellent supplier relationships.

+64 21 646 336
chris@blick.group
MC
Michael Calledine
Logistics Manager (AU)
Australia

Super organised, works hard, and makes sure your orders get despatched on time. Enjoys single malt whiskey and road and mountain biking.

+61 488 288 121
michael.c@blick.group
MT
Michael Tubb
Logistics Manager (NZ)
New Zealand

Formerly a butcher, now our Mighty Mike. You won't find a Logistics Manager with better banter.

+64 22 312 6905
mike@blick.group
Our History

Over 55 years in drilling

1970
Founded as Australasian Diamond Tools — a manufacturing business serving the drilling industry from day one.
2005
New owners. Pivoted from manufacturing to import and distribution — a sharper focus, broader reach.
2008
Renamed Blick. Sold the manufacturing side and expanded across all drilling industries — HDD, geotech, waterwell, and more.
2018
Ownership restructure. New business partner, new mission — more skin in the game, deeper commitment to our customers and our team.
Get in Touch

Ready to talk?

Reach out to the team directly, or use our contact page and we'll connect you with the right person.
